title: Sunehri Yaadein
desc: A comprehensive compilation of musical hits and songs composed and performed by legendary Bollywood singers and artists.

title: Filmi Gaane
desc: A comprehensive compilation of Bollywood songs composed and performed by legendary musical artists is played back to back.

title: Gaanon ki Daraaz Se
desc: Host Manoj Muntashir, a renowned lyricist and vocalist, plays classic tracks and shares the unknown tales of the beloved songs and artists.

title: Anmol Ratna
desc: The host provides a deep insight into some of the most underrated melodious musical compositions and tunes from classic Bollywood films.

title: Is Duniya Ke Sitare
desc: The host engages in a conversation with the popular celebrities of the entertainment industry about their personal lives and a variety of other topics.

title: Trimurti
desc: Nandu gets separated from his brothers, Vijay and Bhola, after learning that he is Jagannath's son and soon becomes arrogant. However, Nandu gets in trouble when Jagannath is found murdered.

title: Evergreen Mix

title: Mere Humdum Mere Dost
desc: A young man falls in love with a rich heiress posing as a poor girl. Appalled by her deception, he severs ties with her. Soon he learns the shocking truth behind his father's death.

title: Trishul
desc: Born out of wedlock, Vijay grows up with deep resentment towards his biological father Raj, a wealthy industrialist who has been leading a comfortable life with his legitimate family in the big city.

title: Don
desc: Don, a wanted criminal, succumbs to his injuries in a police chase. Things take a turn when Vijay, a lookalike of Don, replaces him and tries to trace the details of his illegal activities.
